title.description: App name shown in the header. A recipe discovery app for world cuisines.

subtitle.description: Tagline shown below the app name in the header.

heroTitle.description: Main heading on the home page hero section.

heroSubtitle.description: Subtitle text displayed under the hero heading on the home page.

featuredTitle.description: Section heading displayed above the recipe card grid.

cookingTime.description: Cooking time label on a recipe card. {minutes} is replaced with the number of minutes.

difficulty.description: Label displayed before the difficulty level on a recipe card.

easy.description: Difficulty level label indicating an easy recipe.

medium.description: Difficulty level label indicating a moderately difficult recipe.

hard.description: Difficulty level label indicating a difficult recipe.

ramenName.description: Name of the Tonkotsu Ramen recipe.

ramenDescription.text: Rik pöks bon löf obsik, lenik chashu, sofik-boled äg, e frälik nudels.
ramenDescription.description: Description of the Tonkotsu Ramen recipe.

margheritaName.description: Name of the Margherita Pizza recipe.

margheritaDescription.text: Klasik Neapolitan pizza pö San Marzano tomät, frälik mozzarella, e basil.
margheritaDescription.description: Description of the Margherita Pizza recipe.

tacosName.description: Name of the Tacos al Pastor recipe.

tacosDescription.text: Marinad pöks tacos pö ananäs, cilantro, e onion pä corn tortillas.
tacosDescription.description: Description of the Tacos al Pastor recipe.

butterChickenName.description: Name of the Butter Chicken recipe.

butterChickenDescription.text: Lenik chicken in kremik tomät e butter saus pä aromatik spices.
butterChickenDescription.description: Description of the Butter Chicken recipe.

padThaiName.description: Name of the Pad Thai recipe.

padThaiDescription.text: Stir-fried ris nudels pö shrimp, tofu, peanuts, e tamarind saus.
padThaiDescription.description: Description of the Pad Thai recipe.

crepesName.description: Name of the French Crepes recipe.

crepesDescription.text: Thin, delikat crepes plenad pö Nutella, frälik strawberrys, e whipped cream.
crepesDescription.description: Description of the French Crepes recipe.

label.description: Accessible label for the language switcher dropdown in the header.

en.description: English language option in the locale switcher.

ja.description: Japanese language option in the locale switcher.

es.description: Spanish language option in the locale switcher.
